hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[HOOK REMINDER after Edit/Write] (1) Update CODEBASE_MAP.md if backend files touched (2) npm test before commit (3) Backend files = commit only, no deploy (4) META-RULE: did this edit expose a new bug class? Add audit skill invariant. (5) ANTI-VIBE: same pattern already exists 3+ places? → extract to shared. Used Math.random for a URL token? → crypto.getRandomValues. Wrote to a public doc? → no user.uid/admin field. Added a new Firestore collection? → verify reader AND writer AND size-justification."}'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(backend|Backend|SaleTab|CloneTab|CustomerListTab|CustomerCard|CustomerDetailView|MasterDataTab|AppointmentTab|FinanceTab|DepositPanel|WalletPanel|MembershipPanel|PointsPanel|TreatmentFormPage|BackendDashboard)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Backend files should NOT be deployed via vercel --prod. Commit only." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[META-RULES 2026-04-19 iron-clad, NEVER FORGET] (1) ยิ่งทำงาน ยิ่งเรียนรู้ ยิ่งเก่งขึ้น — every bug → add test + audit skill invariant; every new pattern → document + skill-ify; every session leaves .claude/skills/** sharper. (2) ANTI-VIBE-CODE: Rule of 3 (pattern ≥ 3 places → extract shared) / NO Math.random for URL tokens — crypto.getRandomValues / NO user.uid in world-readable docs / NO allow:if-true Firestore or Storage rules / NO new Firestore collection without real reader+writer+size-reason. See .claude/rules/07-continuous-improvement.md, 08-anti-vibe-code.md + memory/feedback_*. Audit: /audit-all (17 skills / 175 invariants). [SESSION CONTEXT] Phase 8/12 DONE. 1054 tests pass. Rules: Backend files = commit only / npm test ALL PASS before commit / Update CODEBASE_MAP.md / Thai red NOT on patient names / No IIFE in JSX / Firestore REST PATCH needs updateMask / Thai time via bangkokNow+thaiTodayISO / Schedule-link resync uses shouldBlockScheduleSlot."}'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[META-RULES] (1) Fix a bug this turn → add/extend audit skill invariant. New pattern → skill-ify. (2) ANTI-VIBE: Rule of 3 before new helper (grep existing first). No Math.random tokens. No user.uid in public docs. No premature Firestore collection. (.claude/rules/07, 08)"}'
